name: Last Rites Collective
specialty: Specialists in solving complex cases involving supernatural threats, their keen instincts and unique blend of mysticism and tactical prowess sets them apart from other adventurers

members.name: Elysia Thornwhisper
members.note: Her eyes glow an eerie silver, a remnant of a pact with a spectral entity

members.name: Kaelin Ironfist
members.note: Scarred face from countless battles against the city's dark forces

members.name: Zephyr Silverclaw
members.note: Known for his slick-talking, he wears a silver collar, a trophy from a successful heist

visual: Clad in dark leather armor with silver accents, they move with a purposeful, calculated stride, giving off an aura of professionalism and danger. A silver raven perched on Elysia's shoulder serves as their calling card
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity claim that they are more than mere adventurers; they are enforcers of the Argent Blades, striking fear into the hearts of the city's darkest creatures
history: [2026-03-14] Completed a standard-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
